article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.11. CA - (CB-3264) Central Valley Greenway Culvert Replacement 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $1.36M contract for Central Valley Greenway culvert and paving work
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on awarding a $1,360,391 contract to Drake Excavating (2016) Ltd. to replace 16 culverts and complete final paving along the Central Valley Greenway trail between Sperling Avenue and Douglas Road.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the April 14 council decision if your business operates near the Central Valley Greenway trail.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — Central Valley Greenway culvert contract award
